content:
A user reported this:
D-Zone W2A3, first fight happens without issue and second fight taking the Portal to the South-East of the zone lead to this.

Can't click anywhere, Awakener and Monsters do their little idle animations but can't use any shortcut or actions to escape the loop.
Didn't have the "Fight Start" popup appears, just loading in and stuck.

Even closing the game and going back in the battle didn't fix the problem.

Only leaving the run have fixed it and it didn't happen again. So it seems like an isolated incident, but still something that is better report in case it become more common.
thread_title: Dtide lock bug

content:
Is not rare that players on pc become stuck wile the game is loading.
A fix for it seems to include uninstalling the game and removing the folder AppData\LocalLow\Morimens, and then reinstalling it.

Could the team see if during the uninstall process there are files left behind in that folder or other possible bugs related to that, that could cause the bug in the first place?

In the second image the user also found additional Morimens folders that shouldn't normally be present. Or at least aren't present for me.
And removing all folders before reinstalling fixed the problem.
thread_title: Fix for game stuck

content: i had the same issue and deleting the file and reinstalling worked :')
thread_title: Fix for game stuck

content:
Right now you can only set one Awakener as a support option, so most players just go with their strongest character.

If we had multiple slots, I'm a little worried the support list might get too messy.

And yeah, like this Keeper said, there are already 4 extra display slots as it is.

I'll make a note of your suggestion for now.
